summary: The diff shows Layout.tsx was modified to add a bike logo image to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark in the header. However, the image source used is '/assets/file_000000006ec461f5905d0bdb5d01b34a(1)(1).png' rather than the required '/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.png' path specified in REQ-11.

missing_requirements.requirement: The logo image must be rendered as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the image src is set to '/assets/file_000000006ec461f5905d0bdb5d01b34a(1)(1).png' instead of the required '/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.png' path specified by REQ-11.

hallucinated_features.description: The bike logo image is also added to the footer alongside the Cleanio brand name
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-11 only specifies placing the logo in the sticky header. Adding it to the footer was not requested.
